title: Schedule
Directions
text: The conference will take place at the Department of Mathematics and Computer Science of the University of Catania, Italy.

title: Directions
section: From the airport to the hotels
text:
From the airport to the hotels
To go from the airport to the hotel/B&Bs where you will lodge, you can take the Alibus (map and schedule available here). The best stop for all the hotel/B&Bs is no. 21 (no. 20 is almost equivalent). This stop is at 3 minutes walking distance to Ottomood ala ovest, 12 minutes to Casa Barbero and 15 minutes to Rooms al Centro.
If your luggage is heavy, to go to Casa Barbero and to Rooms al Centro you can take, with the same ticket, any bus on via Etnea going up (on the other side of the road) for two stops. The ticket of the Alibus costs 4 euro and can be bought on the bus.
Otherwise you can find taxi immediately out of the arrivals of the airport (please take only official taxis).

title: Directions
section: From the hotels to the conference venue
text:
From the hotels to the conference venue
To go from the hotel/B&Bs to the math department, if you do not want to walk (the department is about 20/30 minutes far from the hotels, but it is a climb and in June it could be hot), the best solution is to take the bus BRT1 from the stop no. 14 to the stop no. 22.
Information on the tickets can be found at the AMTS website.

title: Directions
text:
Cafeterias
In the campus there are two cafeterias were you can eat the lunch, one in the CUS (Sport University Centre) and one in the Engineering building, both very close to Math Department. Otherwise you can walk 15 minutes to Terra² (you can find it on google maps) which has food of very good quality, but is a small place. So if you want to try it, tell to some Italian participant, that can try to call to reserve a table.

title: Directions
text:
WI-FI
Eduroam is available in the campus.
